_comment: Live pass/fail state for every assertion in validation-contract.md. Updated by user-testing validator per milestone. Status: pending | passed | failed | blocked.

VAL-QUOTA-009.note: Limits refresh via Realtime UPDATE on usage_counters today; full plan-change-without-reload scenario needs Playwright verification.

VAL-QUOTA-010.note: Inherits idempotency from M2F3 processed_stripe_events gate; full usage_counters reset test lands with M3F4.

VAL-SET-002.note: SETTINGS_NAV_ITEMS ordering pinned by unit test.

VAL-SET-004.note: Site settings moved intact; existing fields preserved.

VAL-FILE-003.note: PDF round-trip via pdf-lib + pdf-parse verified.

VAL-FILE-023.note: decodeText fatal-to-replacement fallback unit-tested with Latin-1 CSV.

VAL-TOS-001.note: Checkbox disables submit; handleSubmit returns early without network if bypassed. Playwright screenshot of disabled state pending.
